title: Best Adapted Screenplay Winner - 2026 Oscars
text: Winner: Paul Thomas Anderson for One Battle After Another (Warner Bros.). Paul Thomas Anderson's win marks a significant milestone in his career. According to the coverage, this represents his first-ever wins at the Academy Awards, as he also took home Best Director and contributed to the film's Best Picture victory. The adapted screenplay category included nominees: Will Tracy for Bugonia, Guillermo del Toro for Frankenstein, Chloé Zhao & Maggie O'Farrell for Hamnet, and Clint Bentley & Greg Kwedar for Train Dreams. One Battle After Another dominated the 98th Oscars ceremony, securing six total awards including Best Picture and Best Director, both for Anderson. The film's success contributed to Warner Bros. achieving a record-breaking night at the ceremony.
